'''pavufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:racahout|racahout]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-v-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:racahout|racahout]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| pavufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pævifith|pævifith]] || [[word:pævifij|pævifij]] || [[word:pævifish|pævifish]] || [[word:pævifi|pævifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pavuvufuth|pavuvufuth]] || [[word:pavuvufuj|pavuvufuj]] || [[word:pavuvufush|pavuvufush]] || [[word:pavuvufu|pavuvufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pavufuth|pavufuth]] || [[word:pavufuj|pavufuj]] || [[word:pavufush|pavufush]] || [[word:pavufu|pavufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pavuffuth|pavuffuth]] || [[word:pavuffuj|pavuffuj]] || [[word:pavuffush|pavuffush]] || [[word:pavuffuf|pavuffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pavufuthu|pavufuthu]] || [[word:pavufuju|pavufuju]] || [[word:pavufushu|pavufushu]] || [[word:pavufuku|pavufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pavufuth|pavufuth]] || [[word:pavufuj|pavufuj]] || [[word:pavufush|pavufush]] || [[word:pavufu|pavufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pavufuthul|pavufuthul]] || [[word:pavufujul|pavufujul]] || [[word:pavufushul|pavufushul]] || [[word:pavufukul|pavufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pavufuthuthu|pavufuthuthu]] || [[word:pavufujuju|pavufujuju]] || [[word:pavufushushu|pavufushushu]] || [[word:pavufuku|pavufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pavufuthun|pavufuthun]] || [[word:pavufujun|pavufujun]] || [[word:pavufushun|pavufushun]] || [[word:pavufukun|pavufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pavufuthuoro|pavufuthuoro]] || [[word:pavufujuoro|pavufujuoro]] || [[word:pavufushuoro|pavufushuoro]] || [[word:pavufukuoro|pavufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
